data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_RunMonitoringLoop_StatusChanged
data.value: [{0}] Status changed to: {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_CollectStatus_StatusNotAvailable
data.value: [{0}] (status not available) currentPhase: {1}

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_CollectStatus_NoEntriesInStatusTable
data.value: [{0}] No entries in status table.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_CollectStatus_Exception
data.value: [{0}] currentPhase: {1}, exception while querying for blue/green status.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_CollectStatus_UnhandledException
data.value: An error occured while retrieving the blue/green fast switchover metadata.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_OpenConnection_OpeningConnectionWithIp
data.value: [{0}] Opening monitoring connection (IP) to {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_OpenConnection_OpenedConnectionWithIp
data.value: [{0}] Opened monitoring connection (IP) to {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_OpenConnection_OpeningConnection
data.value: [{0}] Opening monitoring connection to {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_OpenConnection_OpenedConnection
data.value: [{0}] Opened monitoring connection to {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_InitHostListProvider_CreateHostListProvider
data.value: [{0}] Creating a new HostListProvider, clusterId: {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_InitHostListProvider_HostSpecNull
data.value: Unable to initialize HostListProvider since connection host information is null.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusMonitor_CollectStatus_UnhandledSqlException
data.value: [{0}] Unhandled SQLException.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UnsupportedDialect
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Blue/Green Deployments isn''t supported by database dialect {1}.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UpdatePhase_Rollback
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Blue/Green deployment is in rollback mode.

data.name: RejectConnectRouting_Apply_InProgressCantConnect
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is in progress. New connection can''t be opened.

data.name: SuspendConnectRouting_Apply_InProgressHoldConnect
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is in progress. The ''connect'' call will be delayed until switchover is completed.

data.name: SuspendConnectRouting_Apply_InProgressTryConnectLater
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is still in progress after {0} ms. Try to connect again later.

data.name: SuspendConnectRouting_Apply_SwitchoverCompleteContinueWithConnect
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is completed. Continue with connect call. The call was held for {0} ms.

data.name: SuspendExecuteRouting_Apply_InProgressSuspendMethod
data.value: "Blue/Green Deployment switchover is in progress. Suspend '{0}' call until switchover is completed."

data.name: SuspendExecuteRouting_Apply_StillInProgressTryMethodLater
data.value: "Blue/Green Deployment switchover is still in progress after {0} ms. Try '{1}' again later."

data.name: SuspendExecuteRouting_Apply_SwitchoverCompletedContinueWithMethod
data.value: "Blue/Green Deployment switchover is completed. Continue with '{0}' call. The call was held for {1} ms."

data.name: SuspendUntilCorrespondingNodeFoundConnectRouting_Apply_WaitConnectUntilCorrespondingNodeFound
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is in progress and a corresponding node for ''{0}'' is not found. The ''connect'' call will be delayed.

data.name: SuspendUntilCorrespondingNodeFoundConnectRouting_Apply_CompletedContinueWithConnect
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment status is completed. Continue with ''connect'' call. The call was held for {0} ms.

data.name: SuspendUntilCorrespondingNodeFoundConnectRouting_Apply_CorrespondingNodeFoundContinueWithConnect
data.value: A corresponding node for ''{0}'' is found. Continue with connect call. The call was held for {1} ms.

data.name: SuspendUntilCorrespondingNodeFoundConnectRouting_Apply_CorrespondingNodeNotFoundTryConnectLater
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is still in progress and a corresponding node for ''{0}'' is not found after {1} ms. Try to connect again later.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UnknownPhase
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Unknown BG phase ''{1}''.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UpdateDnsFlags_BlueDnsCompleted
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Blue DNS update completed.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UpdateDnsFlags_GreenDnsRemoved
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Green DNS removed.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_UpdateDnsFlags_GreenTopologyChanged
data.value: [bgdId: ''{0}''] Green topology changed.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_SwitchoverTimeout
data.value: Blue/Green switchover has timed out.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_ResetContext
data.value: Resetting context.

data.name: BlueGreenStatusProvider_RegisterIamHost_GreenNodeChangedName
data.value: Green node ''{0}'' has changed its name to ''{1}''.

data.name: SubstituteConnectRouting_Apply_RequireIamHost
data.value: Connecting with IP address when IAM authentication is enabled requires an ''iamHost'' parameter.

data.name: SubstituteConnectRouting_Apply_InProgressCantOpenConnection
data.value: Blue/Green Deployment switchover is in progress. Can''t establish connection to ''{0}''.
